facebook.caption: POV: you wander down 30 Tháng 4 Street and find a Vietnamese restaurant sitting at 4.9 stars with 174 reviews. Not a resort. Not a tourist trap. Just locals who clearly know something you don't. Sen River Restaurant in Phú Quốc is that place. Get there before the crowds figure it out. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
